name: LIANG FAMILY
description: Yunhe Village is a tiny isolated mountain settlement in rural China inhabited by only five long-standing families who survive through traditional farming, tea production, herbal medicine, hunting, and handcrafted goods. One month after the sudden death of the village chief Liang Wei, his widow Lin Meiyun struggles to carry the burden of leadership while hiding her grief behind calm authority and endless work. Beside her is Liang Xinyi, their gentle eighteen-year-old daughter torn between loyalty toward her fading village and dreams of a life beyond the mountains. Together, the mother and daughter quietly navigate loss, responsibility, isolation, and the uncertain future of Yunhe Village.
creator: Momocangen
